subcategory.title: Snowshoeing
subcategory.description: Rent your snowshoes here or book a guided tour with or without fondue fun. In the past, snowshoes were the usual means of transportation in snowy areas. The weight is distributed over a larger area, making it easier for the snowshoe wearer to walk through deep snow. Today, snowshoeing is a popular winter sport that can be done in the mountains but also guided or individually at lower altitudes.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
